briefdescription.para: The base address of the core instance.
Oba0 main path of bits per pixel.
Oba0 main path of pixel per clock.
Oba0 main path of dataformat support.
Oba0 self path of bits per pixel.
Oba0 self path of pixel per clock.
Oba0 self path of dataformat support.
Oba1 main path of bits per pixel.
Oba1 main path of pixel per clock.
Oba1 main path of dataformat support.
Oba1 self path of bits per pixel.
Oba1 self path of pixel per clock.
Oba1 self path of dataformat support.
This typedef contains configuration information for the VISP SS core Each core instance should have a configuration structure associated.
